mergewith.subtemplate:
<branchRateModel spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.branchratemodel.StrictClockModel' id='StrictClock.c:$(n)'> <clock.rate id='clockRate.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value='1.0' estimate='false'/> </branchRateModel> <operator id='StrictClockRateScaler.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter='@clockRate.c:$(n)'/> <operator id='strictClockUpDownOperator.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.UpDownOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3"> <up idref="clockRate.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:tree"/> </operator>
<distribution id='ClockPrior.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma' param='@clockRate.c:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
substitution rate of partition c:clock
Scale substitution rate of partition c:clock
Scale up substitution rate c:clock and scale down tree t:tree

<input spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.branchratemodel.UCRelaxedClockModel' id="ExponentialRelaxedClock.c:$(n)" tree='@Tree.t:tree'> <clock.rate id='ucedMean.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value='1.0' estimate='false'/> <distr id='Exponential.c:$(n)' spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential"> <mean id='UCExpLambda.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value='1.0' estimate='false'/> </distr> <rateCategories spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.IntVectorParam' domain='NonNegativeInt' id='expRateCategories.c:$(n)' value="1" dimension='10' estimate='true'/> </input> <operator id='ucedMeanScaler.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleAll='false' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="1" parameter="@ucedMean.c:$(n)"/> <operator id="ExpCategoriesRandomWalk.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.IntRandomWalkOperator" windowSize='1' weight="10" parameter="@expRateCategories.c:$(n)"/> <operator id='ExpCategoriesSwapOperator.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.SwapOperator' howMany="1" weight="10" intparameter='@expRateCategories.c:$(n)'/> <operator id='ExpCategoriesUniform.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.uniform.IntUniformOperator' weight="10" parameter='@expRateCategories.c:$(n)'/> <operator id='relaxedUpDownOperatorExp.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.UpDownOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3"> <up idref="ucedMean.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:tree"/> </operator> <log id='rateStat.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.evolution.RateStatistic' tree='@Tree.t:tree' branchratemodel='@ExponentialRelaxedClock.c:$(n)'/> <distribution id='UCMeanRatePrior.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma' param='@ucedMean.c:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
uncorrelated exponential relaxed clock mean of partition c:clock
Scale clock rate of partition c:clock
Randomly change categories of partition c:clock
Swap categories of partition c:clock
Uniformly draw categories of partition c:clock
Up/down scaler for mean rate and tree of partition c:clock

<input spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.branchratemodel.UCRelaxedClockModel' id="RelaxedClock.c:$(n)" tree='@Tree.t:tree'> <clock.rate id='ucldMean.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value='1.0'/> <distr id='LogNormalDistributionModel.c:$(n)' spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.LogNormal" meanInRealSpace='true'> <M spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='Real' value="1.0" estimate='false'/> <S id='ucldStdev.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="0.1" estimate='true'/> </distr> <rateCategories spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.IntVectorParam' domain='NonNegativeInt' id='rateCategories.c:$(n)' value="1" dimension='10' estimate='true'/> </input> <operator id='ucldMeanScaler.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleAll='false' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="1" parameter="@ucldMean.c:$(n)"/> <operator id='ucldStdevScaler.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleAll='false' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="3" parameter="@ucldStdev.c:$(n)"/> <operator id="CategoriesRandomWalk.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.IntRandomWalkOperator" windowSize='1' weight="10" parameter="@rateCategories.c:$(n)"/> <operator id='CategoriesSwapOperator.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.SwapOperator' howMany="1" weight="10" intparameter='@rateCategories.c:$(n)'/> <operator id='CategoriesUniform.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.uniform.IntUniformOperator' weight="10" parameter='@rateCategories.c:$(n)'/> <operator id='relaxedUpDownOperator.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.UpDownOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3"> <up idref="ucldMean.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:tree"/> </operator> <!-- this prior has a median of 0.1 and 97.5% of its probability is below S=1 --> <distribution id='ucldStdevPrior.c:$(n)' spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma" param='@ucldStdev.c:$(n)'> <alpha spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="0.5396" estimate='false'/> <!-- shape --> <theta spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="0.3819" estimate='false'/> <!-- scale --> </distribution> <log id='rate.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.evolution.RateStatistic' tree='@Tree.t:tree' branchratemodel='@RelaxedClock.c:$(n)'/> <distribution id='MeanRatePrior.c:$(n)' spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma" param='@ucldMean.c:$(n)'> <alpha spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="0.01" estimate='false'/> <theta spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="100.0" estimate='false'/> </distribution>
Scale clock rate of partition c:clock
Scale stdev of rate of partition c:clock
Randomly change categories of partition c:clock
Swap categories of partition c:clock
Uniformly draw categories of partition c:clock
Up/down scaler for mean rate and tree of partition c:clock
uncorrelated lognormal relaxed clock stdev of partition c:clock
uncorrelated lognormal relaxed clock mean of partition c:clock

<input spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.branchratemodel.RandomLocalClockModel' id="RandomLocalClock.c:$(n)" ratesAreMultipliers="false" tree='@Tree.t:tree'> <clock.rate id='meanClockRate.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value='1.0' estimate='false'/> <parameter spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.BoolVectorParam' name='indicators' id='Indicators.c:$(n)' value="0"/> <parameter spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam' domain='PositiveReal' name='rates' id='clockrates.c:$(n)' value="1"/> </input> <operator id="IndicatorsBitFlip.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.BitFlipOperator" weight="15" parameter="@Indicators.c:$(n)"/> <!-- this should probably be a DeltaExchange instead of scale operator to keep mean rate to 1 --> <operator id='ClockRateScaler.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleAll='false' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="15" parameter="@clockrates.c:$(n)"/> <operator id='randomClockScaler.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleAll='false' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="1" parameter="@meanClockRate.c:$(n)"/> <operator id='randomClockUpDownOperator.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.UpDownOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3"> <up idref="meanClockRate.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:tree"/> </operator> <distribution idref="prior"> <if cond='inlikelihood(RandomLocalClock.c:$(n))'> <!-- prior on rates --> <distribution id='RRatesPrior.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.IID' param='@clockrates.c:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma"> <alpha spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="0.5" estimate="false"/> <theta spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="2.0" estimate="false"/> </distr> </distribution> <!-- prior on number of changes --> <distribution id="RRateChangesPrior.c:$(n)" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Poisson'> <param id="RRateChanges.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.IntSum" arg="@Indicators.c:$(n)"/> <lambda spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' estimate='false' value='0.6931471805599453'/> </distribution> </if> </distribution> <logger idref="tracelog"> <if cond='inlikelihood(RandomLocalClock.c:$(n))'> <log idref="RRateChanges.c:$(n)"/> </if> </logger> <distribution id='MeanRRatePrior.c:$(n)' spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma" param='@meanClockRate.c:$(n)'> <alpha spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain='PositiveReal' value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
Scale clock rate of partition c:clock
Up/down scaler for mean rate and tree of partition c:clock
Flip indicator bits for random clock of partition c:clock
Scale random clock rates of partition c:clock
substitution rate of partition c:clock
